sourceMovie.title: They Live
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: They Live works as a science fiction movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The science fiction and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Riddick
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If They Live clicked for you, Riddick (2013) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after They Live?
faq.answer: Try Riddick, Predator 2, Independence Day—each shares DNA with They Live while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is They Live?
faq.answer: They Live (1988) is best described as Science Fiction, Action, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is They Live worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this science fiction lane.
